messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: API returns 500 on bulk task creation

POST /v2/tasks/bulk with more than ~200 items returns a 500 with no body. Smaller batches work. We're trying to migrate 10k tasks and this is a hard blocker for our launch tomorrow.

response.content: {"category":"bug","priority":"urgent","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Sorry — a 500 on bulk creation blocking your launch is serious. I've escalated to the API team as urgent; in the meantime batches of 150 or fewer succeed reliably."}
